name: Fish Mulligan
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds fresh haddock, cut into 2 1/2-inch pieces
1 1/2 pounds peeled potatoes, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep kettle or Dutch oven, sauté bacon until lightly browned; remove and set aside.
2. In the same pot, sauté onions until tender.
3. Add fish, potatoes, celery seeds, carrots, green peppers, salt, pepper, chicken (or other seafood), and boiling water.
4. Simmer, covered, for about 25 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Add tomatoes; heat through.
6. Garnish with parsley and crumbled bacon bits.
7. Serves 6 main dishes. Recipe can be doubled using 1 pound of bacon!
